keyEvents.text: Goal!  Saint Lucia 0, Aruba 1. Walter Bennett (Aruba) header from very close range to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Tyron Gentil with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Leaus Henville replaces Cheye Alexander because of an injury.
Goal!  Saint Lucia 0, Aruba 2. Isai Marselia (Aruba) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Goal!  Saint Lucia 1, Aruba 2. Ridel Stanislas (Saint Lucia) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Caniggia Elva.
First Half ends, Saint Lucia 1, Aruba 2.
Second Half begins Saint Lucia 1, Aruba 2.
Substitution, Aruba. Nickenson Paul replaces Diederick Luydens.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Aaron Richard replaces Lester Joseph.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Peter Pearson replaces Josh Solomon-Davies.
Substitution, Aruba. Benjamin Maria replaces Isai Marselia.
Substitution, Aruba. Jayden Kruydenhof replaces Tyron Gentil.
Goal!  Saint Lucia 2, Aruba 2. Peter Pearson (Saint Lucia) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Caniggia Elva.
Substitution, Aruba. Roviën Ostiana replaces Stiven Melchor Rua.
Substitution, Aruba. Ashton Charles replaces Terence Groothusen.
Substitution, Saint Lucia. Baggio Edward replaces Ridel Stanislas.
Melvin Doxilly (Saint Lucia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Fernando Lewis (Aruba) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
